entries.LogEntry: PO200 Chat - Seth Southern - Everyone, there is a meeting on Thursday at 3pm UTC titled "PerfOps Portal (Costroller) - Onboarding & Demo". The PerfOps team will be introducing a new calendar to replace the PO200 calendar. It will be a single consolidated calendar for all groups (PO200 and CX1). Our intention is to switch over to that calendar on that day. Please attend or watch the recording. Your events that are currently on the PO200 will not automatically transfer to the new calendar and you will need to set them up once the new calendar is live.

Email until we know it is a problem
Then Xmatters?   

vs XMatters Only
